ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic event */,
  "label" INTEGER /* Label or identifier for the event */,
  "in_change" INTEGER /* Number of changes in incoming traffic */,
  "out_change" INTEGER /* Number of changes in outgoing traffic */,
  "in_file" INTEGER /* Number of files in incoming traffic */,
  "out_file" INTEGER /* Number of files in outgoing traffic */,
  "in_loc" INTEGER /* Location of incoming traffic (e.g., IP address, location ID) */,
  "out_loc" INTEGER /* Location of outgoing traffic (e.g., IP address, location ID) */,
  "traffic_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of traffic event */,
  "network_segment" TEXT /* Network segment where the traffic event occurred */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Communication protocol used */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss rate */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency in the network */,
  "in_change_file_r" REAL /* Ratio of changes to files in incoming traffic */,
  "out_change_file_r" REAL /* Ratio of changes to files in outgoing traffic */,
  "in_change_loc_r" REAL /* Ratio of changes to locations in incoming traffic */,
  "out_change_loc_r" REAL /* Ratio of changes to locations in outgoing traffic */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the traffic */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the traffic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_source_ip FOREIGN KEY ("source_ip") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_in_loc FOREIGN KEY ("in_loc") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_destination_ip FOREIGN KEY ("destination_ip") REFERENCES ip_addresses ("ip_address"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_events_out_loc FOREIGN KEY ("out_loc") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Bandwidth capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ip_addresses" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the IP address is used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the IP address */,
  "ip_address_type" TEXT /* Type of IP address */,
  "subnet_mask" TEXT /* Subnet mask for the IP address */,
  "gateway" TEXT /* Gateway IP address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the traffic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traffic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic event being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method of access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic event where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., high traffic, unexpected change) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the anomaly (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_category" TEXT /* Category of the anomaly */,
  "recommended_action" TEXT /* Recommended action for resolving the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES traffic_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
